creator: grahamperrin@gmail.com
text:
Please change the prefix of this report: 

- from sysutils/fusefs-ntfs
- to filesystems/ntfs

– for the report be found by the bug icon at <https://www.freshports.org/filesystems/ntfs/>, and so on. Background: 

- bug 283881

- 'mkntfs unable to format' in FreeBSD Discord, 
  <https://discord.com/channels/727023752348434432/1329760855251750932>.

----

See also: three answers under <https://unix.stackexchange.com/q/513732/13260> (with a comment from me).
